The team at Winchester Ammunition has arrived in Oregon to visit the Leupold Long Range Academy. There, they’ll put Winchester’s new “Supreme Long Range” ammunition to the test, pushing its performance across demanding long-range scenarios.
With precision, consistency, and confidence on the line, the team is eager to demonstrate exactly what “Precision Rifle Perfected” means when every shot counts.

programme.title: Full Strut
programme.desc: Cole has hunted with us before and made a great shot on a bird a few years ago. He's back to hunt Missouri and ready to hunt the first afternoon. The birds were fired up but we had no clue such a giant bird was going to come strolling in!

programme.title: Full Strut
programme.desc: Nate heads out for a quick run-and-gun hunt (with his bow) and it doesn’t take long for things to happen. A gobbler works his way in, struts around the decoys, and eventually gives Nate the shot opportunity he was looking for. A couple days later Cole is up to bat. Right off the roost a gobbler commits and the hunt comes together fast with a close-range archery shot. It was a fun few days chasing Kansas gobblers and this trip gave us a few hunts we won’t forget.

programme.title: Full Strut
programme.desc: Nate heads out for a quick run-and-gun hunt (with his bow) and it doesn’t take long for things to happen. A gobbler works his way in, struts around the decoys, and eventually gives Nate the shot opportunity he was looking for. A couple days later Cole is up to bat. Right off the roost a gobbler commits and the hunt comes together fast with a close-range archery shot. It was a fun few days chasing Kansas gobblers and this trip gave us a few hunts we won’t forget.

programme.title: Surviving Mann
programme.desc: This week, memory meets mission as contestants face off in a high-stakes Kim’s Game challenge—designed to sharpen recall under pressure with 100 points and team leadership on the line. With observation, speed, and accuracy all in play, remembering every detail could make or break the mission. As the team pushes forward, it’s time to dig deeper. Contestants open up about their backstories, revealing the powerful personal reasons that brought them to the toughest reality show on earth. Some are here to prove something. Others? To fight for more than just themselves. The action intensifies as Hoffner Knives returns with a brutal tactical evolution, testing shooting and blade skills with precision under pressure. A split-second difference determines the winner of a major reward—proving that in this game, every tenth of a second matters. The day wraps with a visit from HCA Precision Barrels and one final classroom lesson—a pointed reminder that in the world of elite operators, your story is your strength… or your downfall.

programme.title: Surviving Mann
programme.desc: Mike Glover, Green Beret and retired CIA operative, joins Don to kick it up a notch for our contestants. What would Surviving Mann be without some log PT? If it’s good enough for the Seals - it’s good enough for our contestants. If that wasn’t hard enough, Don and Mike have the contestants do some tire pulling, a run, tug of war, land nav and a Tyrolean traverse over alligator infested water. Oh, and did we mention the 40mph wind and rain storm?

programme.title: Country Ball
programme.desc: Country Ball Coach Jesse Chinchar kicks off the first season of Country Ball in the heartland of football — Pittsburgh, Pennsylvania. His first challenge is to help Cole Weightman - a powerful yet unknown linebacker who reminds many of another great Pittsburgh linebacker — Jack Lambert of the Steelers fame. What lessons and tactics does Jesse have to help Cole get his first offer? And how will Coach Jesse fare when he adventures with Cole and his family? Find out in the premier episode of Country Ball.

programme.title: Farm Hero
programme.desc: Farm Hero season one concludes in Pescadero, California at TomKat Ranch. Laura dissects what’s wrong with our food system on a macro scale and what the average consumer can do to fight back with intentional shopping. Next, rancher Mike Biaggi introduces “the five why’s” and how they apply to holistic management and regenerative agriculture. As we cap off season one, Laura and the team raise their glasses to all the Farm Heroes on the front lines, salvaging our food systems for our fellow Americans and viewers like you.

programme.title: Losing Is Worse Than Death | The Bill Tierney Documentary

programme.title: Finding Adventure: Military Veteran Surfing for Serenity
